name: C2xSetTokenString
title: C2xSetTokenString
syntax: long C2xSetTokenString( long packet, char protocolDesignator[], char tokenDesignator[], char data[] );
long C2xSetTokenString( long packet, char protocolDesignator[], char tokenDesignator[], long byteOffset, char data[] );
description: This function copies the string value to the token without terminating \0.

parameters.name: packet
parameters.description: Handle of a packet that has been created with C2xInitPacket.

parameters.name: protocolDesignator
parameters.description: Name of the protocol, e.g. geo_cnh.

parameters.name: tokenDesignator
parameters.description: Name of the token, e.g. data.

parameters.name: byteOffset
parameters.description: Offset from the beginning of the token in byte.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
